description: Apidog is an API development platform for designing, documenting, testing, and sharing APIs. It also provides AI-oriented MCP connectivity for working with Apidog projects, published API docs, and OpenAPI files.
summary: Apidog exposes a public REST API at `https://api.apidog.com`, an `apidog` CLI, and documents an MCP server for AI integrations; the REST API and CLI use a personal API access token.
